visualGoal: Help a screen-vs-VR racer decide which control layer to add. LOW verified-product density is expected and honest: physical button boxes have no verified photos in our library, so the article leans on a decision table + tip callouts rather than forcing gearpick cards. The one verified product proof is the Elgato Stream Deck XL.
densityHonesty: Only 1 embeddable image is verified for this topic (Stream Deck XL), and it is the ONLY embedded gear image in the article. MOZA RS V2 is referenced as a text link (not an image) because its photo is not in verified-product-images.json. Button boxes are text + Amazon search until real photos are sourced. Do NOT fabricate or reuse a non-matching photo to inflate the count. candidateForCertification is false.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Highest-value photo to source: a carbon-fibre budget box with encoders, toggles and an RGB matrix display would let the button-box side get a real gearpick card. Currently text-only.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: RaceBox GTE button box (integrated 5" telemetry display, SimHub)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: The box-with-a-screen that blurs the deck/box line; strong visual for the 'want dials AND info' buyer.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: Generic USB sim-racing button box (encoders + toggles)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: A neutral, brand-agnostic button box photo would support the category-level comparison without endorsing one small shop.
The default recommendation for most racers, but only the XL photo is verified. MK.2 photo would let us show the size most people should actually buy.

realProductPhotosNeeded.product: Stream Deck + (8 keys + 4 dials + touch strip)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: The dials narrow the button-box advantage; a photo would strengthen the 'deck with rotaries' argument.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic sim-racing cockpit desk at amber rim light, a physical button box with real toggle switches and rotary encoders on the left and a Stream Deck panel with glowing labeled LCD keys on the right, a VR headset resting between them to imply the deciding question, carbon-fibre textures, no fake logos, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake brand logos, warped switches, impossible key labels, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: Button box vs Stream Deck: the decision
content: Race in VR? -> Button box (find blind)
Screen + want dials & toggles? -> Button box
Screen + want macros & telemetry? -> Stream Deck
Want both dials & labels? -> Stream Deck + / box with screen
Wheel still has empty buttons? -> Neither yet
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center flow chart, large readable text, racing colors

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult Gen X sim-racing curator Duke Alvarez at a cockpit desk, one hand on a physical button box toggle, a Stream Deck glowing nearby, confident mechanic energy, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

openQuestions: Source at least one real button-box photo (RaceBox GT-FLAG or a generic USB box) so the button-box side earns a gearpick card instead of text-only.
Confirm Stream Deck + XL real-world availability and US price before treating it as buyable.
Small-shop button-box prices move often — verify before quoting hard numbers.
